programme.desc: The girls decide Taylor needs a good old-fashioned Southern soirée, swapping tales and spillin' tea; Shep kills the fun, however, when he delivers a scandalous rumor to Olivia's front door.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran víctimas en Filadelfia en un estilo similar al de El replicador, el acosador que ha estado siguiendo cada movimiento de BAU, el equipo piensa que esta podría ser la oportunidad que necesitan para tratar de detenerlo.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo del NCIS investiga la desaparición de un contramaestre de la Marina que es el único testigo en un juicio por asesinato que se avecina.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs y el equipo del NCIS se asocian con un agente del Servicio de Investigación de la Guardia Costera (CGIS) para resolver el asesinato de un marine tiroteado en un barco restaurante.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: La sesión de reclutamiento de un suboficial en una feria universitaria tiene un final fatal, lo que lleva al equipo del NCIS, acompañado por el predecesor del Dr. Mallard, a resolver su asesinato.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo del NCIS entra en acción para encontrar al agresor responsable de matar a golpes a un marine en su propio patio.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): La verdad sobre mentir
programme.desc: Danny y Baez investigan la muerte de una adolescente empujada al metro. Frank se molesta por la supervisión del nuevo Inspector General en el NYPD.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Desaparecida
programme.desc: Danny y Baez sospechan que una niña podría ser víctima de secuestro, pero su madre lo niega, aunque su historia no cuadra. Mientras, Frank visita a un sacerdote, consejero del NYPD, arrestado por conducir ebrio.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Músculo
programme.desc: Jamie es cuestionado por la muerte de un pandillero que perseguía. Baez se infiltra para investigar al prometido de la ex de Danny, quien vende drogas desde su gimnasio.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Apuestas mortales
programme.desc: Un oficial es acusado de usar fuerza excesiva, lo que pone al departamento bajo escrutinio. Danny y Maria investigan el asesinato de un corredor de valores endeudado.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Mientras tanto, Reid encara una pérdida en su vida personal, el resto de la UAC viaja a San Francisco para investigar a las víctimas descubiertas en Mission District.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando las hijas de Bruce Morrison, una escritor cuya esposa desapareció misteriosamente el año pasado, desaparecen en el aniversario de la desaparición de su madre, el BAU debe estudiar a Morrison como un posible sospechoso.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC se dirige a Austin para investigar a las víctimas encontradas allí con sus relojes a la hora equivocada, una pista que puede conectar los delitos.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran víctimas en Filadelfia en un estilo similar al de El replicador, el acosador que ha estado siguiendo cada movimiento de BAU, el equipo piensa que esta podría ser la oportunidad que necesitan para tratar de detenerlo.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo del NCIS investiga la desaparición de un contramaestre de la Marina que es el único testigo en un juicio por asesinato que se avecina.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When an innocent man is brutally attacked and beaten to death by what looks like a monster in a black cape, the CSIs are called to investigate, only to learn that a similar attack took place minutes later.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a dead woman is found hanging from a cross inside a church, the team follows the evidence to uncover a bizarre love triangle dating all the way back to the victim's high school days.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When two young boys are reported missing, a known neighborhood sex offender is the primary suspect.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: While investigating an elderly woman's murder, Grissom receives a miniature crime scene replica; Greg attends a hearing to ascertain his culpability in a teenager's accidental death.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When identical twins are found dead, the evidence in both cases does not immediately prove a connection between the two deaths. However, as the CSIs dig deeper into the histories of the women, a surprising twist takes the investigation in a new direction.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team investigate a string of murders in Las Vegas that may be tied to an infamous mob boss from the 1970s who disappeared many years ago.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the CSIs process clues after a murder at a poultry manufacturing plant, the evidence leads them to the home of a man who collects miniature trains and other miniature paraphernalia.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine's testimony in court is not enough to convict a killer suspected of murdering his own mother. Adam Novak, with whom Catherine had a brief romantic encounter, is the lawyer who represents the killer and secures his freedom.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The lead suspect for the high-profile murder of anti-drug crusading assemblyman Danilo Zamesca is Thomas Simon, the west coast's biggest drug supplier.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: As Catherine and Keppler begin to investigate the murder of a teen-aged Jane Doe, both agree that the killer, who was meticulous in removing evidence from the body and its surrounding area, is likely a repeat offender.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A case involving a man's torched corpse whose bones and tissues had been harvested leads Nick and Keppler into the disturbing world of illegally sold human body parts.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom returns from his teaching sabbatical as new member of the team, Michael Keppler desperately tries to keep his dark past hidden from his colleagues.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: With potentially less than a day to attempt to prevent the next murders, the CSI team must quickly shake off their shock that the true miniature killer is not the late Ernie Edward Dell, who committed suicide after confessing to the slayings.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom's quip that two missing young lovers may have run off to Mexico is soon quashed by the discovery of drops of blood by the boy's vacant parking spot at the high school.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Los CSI investigan cuando se descubre el cadáver de una joven no identificada metido en un carrito de la compra volcado cerca de un paso subterráneo de la autopista.

programme.title: CSI en español

programme.title: CSI en español

programme.title: CSI en español

programme.desc: Bizarre occurrences begin to plague the CSIs as they hunt down a serial killer who struck during a total eclipse of the sun.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a model is electrocuted on the runway, the case leads Horatio and the CSI team back to Horatio’s son and his nemesis.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a family vacation turns deadly, the CSIs must find the killer before the survivors take justice into their own hands.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: An attempt on Calleigh's life puts both her professional and personal life in jeopardy. Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Lifestyles of the rich and famous come under the microscope of Horatio and the CSI team when a wealthy family's nanny turns up dead.

programme.desc: When a rare and illegal machine gun vaporizes three weapons' smugglers, the CSIs must find the killer before the gun causes more deaths.

programme.desc: Horatio's ex, and Kyle's mother, resurfaces in Miami as a billionaire's widow who will do anything at all to get her son back.

programme.desc: While investigating the murder of a woman, the CSIs uncover a meth lab in her apartment and an unscrupulous FBI agent with a secret life of his own.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the CSI team investigate a murder at a wedding, the clues eventually lead the CSI team to a local strip club.

programme.desc: Horatio deals with ghosts from his past, the team races against time to save Calleigh from a group of dangerous kidnappers.

programme.desc: Secuestran a una niña y el único testigo que tiene el equipo de CSI es un hombre ciego que oyó el secuestro, lo que lleva a Horatio a un viejo archienemigo.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)
programme.desc: Yamilka está casada con Amhir, un polí­gamo y extremista, y ahora quiere salir de ese infierno. También, Joely se acercó a una congregación religiosa buscando apoyo pero perdió a su bebé.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)
programme.desc: Yahima quiere que su hija abandone la casa porque es una adicta a inhalar chocolate como droga. Por otro lado, la hija de Natalia es autista y en una fiesta tiró al suelo al bebé de Elena.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)
programme.desc: Ella quiere que su pareja deje de consumir morning glory. Él alega que la sustancia mejora su productividad. Alexander perdió la custodia de su hijo al entrar en prisión. El menor se suicidó.

programme.title: Indiana Jones y el templo de la perdicion

programme.title: Indiana Jones y la ultima cruzada
programme.desc: No hay nada más emocionante que intentar seguir el ritmo de los Jones en «Indiana Jones y la última cruzada». Los enemigos nazis de Indy han vuelto y han secuestrado a su padre, en su intento por localizar el sagrado Santo Grial.

programme.desc: Los dos hermanos sin suerte Lars y Ernie Smuntz no aprecian la vieja mansión en ruinas que heredaron, hasta que descubren que la propiedad vale millones.

programme.title: Me late chocolate

programme.title: Casese Quien Pueda
programme.desc: The best-laid love plans go hilariously awry in this romantic-comedy hit about two sisters (Martha and Miriam Higareda) who find themselves in uncharted romantic territory.

programme.title: Aqui Entre Nos (LAS)
programme.desc: Cansado de ser dado por sentado por su esposa y sus 3 hijas, Rodolfo Guerra se levanta una mañana y decide no ir a trabajar. Entonces comienza la locura.

programme.title: Una última y nos vamos
programme.desc: Un grupo de mariachis salen de casa por primera vez para competir en un certamen nacional en la ciudad de México. Los 8 hombres tienen que soportar muchos desafíos, lo que parece ser una oportunidad de su vida, pronto podría conducir al final del grupo.

programme.title: Casese Quien Pueda
programme.desc: The best-laid love plans go hilariously awry in this romantic-comedy hit about two sisters (Martha and Miriam Higareda) who find themselves in uncharted romantic territory.

programme.title: El Infierno
programme.desc: Benny es deportado de Estados Unidos a un México desgarrado por la guerra entre cárteles del narcotráfico. Se involucra en el negocio narco y asciende rápidamente, rodeado de dinero, mujeres, violencia y excesos.

programme.title: Presencias del más allá
programme.desc: Tras más de cien años en actividad, la posada Yankee Pedlar Inn está por cerrar sus puertas. Los empleados que quedan están decididos a demostrar que se trata de uno de los hoteles más embrujados de Nueva Inglaterra.

programme.title: La piel fría
programme.desc: Un joven llega a una isla remota para ocupar un puesto de observador meteorológico y luego se encuentra defendiendo la torre de vigilancia, contra las criaturas mortales que viven en la costa de la isla.

programme.title: La hermandad
programme.desc: Edward Dalton (Ethan Hawke) es investigador en 2019, año en que una plaga convirtió en vampiros a la población. A medida que los humanos se extinguen, los vampiros deben encontrar un sustituto de la sangre. Un hallazgo puede salvar a la humanidad.

programme.title: Tierra de vampiros
programme.desc: Cuando se desata una epidemia de vampirismo y su familia es asesinada, el joven Martin (Connor Paolo) se vuelve el protegido de un canoso y obstinado cazador (Nick Damici) cuya nueva presa son los muertos vivientes.

programme.title: Tierra de vampiros II
programme.desc: Tras el asesinato de su familia, Martin se adentra en las tierras baldías de Estados Unidos en busca de Mister con la esperanza de volver a asociarse con él para combatir una nueva amenaza de vampiros.

programme.title: Solomon Kane (ESP)
programme.desc: El capitán Solomon Kane (James Purefoy) es una máquina de matar brutalmente eficiente del siglo XVI.

programme.title: Tierra de vampiros
programme.desc: Cuando se desata una epidemia de vampirismo y su familia es asesinada, el joven Martin (Connor Paolo) se vuelve el protegido de un canoso y obstinado cazador (Nick Damici) cuya nueva presa son los muertos vivientes.

programme.title: From Noon Till Three
programme.desc: Charles Bronson plays Graham Dorsey, a bank robber who, through a series of twists and turns finds himself the object of national adoration. A beautiful widow, Amanda Starbuck (Jill Ireland) is responsible for creating this myth.

programme.title: Young Billy Young
programme.desc: In this gun-slinging adventure, an aging lawman (Robert Mitchum) teams up with Young Billy Young (Robert Walker), a fast-draw outlaw on the run. But it’s an alliance that explodes when the lawman discovers a secret that could rip two towns apart!

programme.title: Duel at Diablo
programme.desc: Frontier scout Jess Remsberg leads a wagon train through hostile territory to Fort Conchos. But underneath his valor, he has an ulterior motive: to settle a score with the man he believes killed his wife. James Garner and Sidney Poitier star.

programme.title: The Ride Back
programme.desc: A lawman's grim duty and an outlaw's despair collide as Texas Marshal Hamish (William Conrad) must transport outlaw Kallen (Anthony Quinn) to face justice. But when Hamish is seriously wounded, which will Kallen choose: freedom or redemption?

programme.title: Warlock
programme.desc: An ex-outlaw (Richard Widmark) divides and challenges a quick-draw lawman (Henry Fonda) and his sidekick (Anthony Quinn).

programme.title: The Gunfight at Dodge City
programme.desc: Seeking a fresh start, Bat Masterson (Joel McCrea) rolls into Dodge City with a chip on his shoulder and a gun on his hip. But soon, his mysterious past will catch up with him when an old friend calls in a favor...one that might cost him his life!

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven (1960)
programme.desc: Yul Brynner stars as one of seven gunslingers pitted against an army of marauding bandits in this rousing classic that made stars of Steve McQueen, Charles Bronson, and James Coburn. Eli Wallach also stars in this timeless tale of good versus evil.

programme.title: The Bridges at Toko-Ri
programme.desc: This masterful story of a war-weary World War II veteran who must leave his family to fight again combines moving drama with surefire, bombs-away aerial action. Also starring Grace Kelly as his loving, luminescent wife.

programme.title: Stalag 17
programme.desc: Laced with comedy and cynicism, this is the story of a group of GIs who are thrown together in the notorious German prison camp Stalag 17, their suspicions about one being a spy and their efforts to escape.

programme.title: Witness for the Prosecution (1958)
programme.desc: Tyrone Power, Marlene Dietrich and Charles Laughton star in this exceptional courtroom Drama about a young man on trial for a wealthy widow's murder after he suspiciously profits from her will.

programme.title: Ace in the Hole

programme.title: Con el culo al aire

programme.title: Daria

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: Una enorme red de confusiones, extraños eventos y malentendidos crea múltiples sospechas en Daria de que invasiones marcianas y espionajes comunistas han logrado apoderarse del vecindario de Lawndale.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: La preparatoria de Lawndale organiza un crucero con un casino para recolectar dinero y todos deben asistir como voluntarios. Daria y Jane intentan dormir en el crucero mientras todos las interrumpen.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: Jane conoce a Tom Sloane en el recital de la banda de Trent, ambos se van del recital a comer, dejando a Daria junto a Trent. Mientras tanto, Daria le ofrece a Trent hacer un proyecto juntos.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: La señora Broflovski protesta por las actividades navideñas que se realizan en la escuela. Mientras tanto, Kyle se siente solo por ser judío y nadie le cree cuando trata de convencer al pueblo sobre la existencia del señor Mojón.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: El señor Garrison se hace una cirugía plástica en la nariz y abandona la enseñanza para convertirse en un modelo. Mientras tanto, Stan se enamora de Ellen, la maestra sustituta, de modo que Wendy, su novia, se pone celosa.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Los chicos encuentran un antiguo objeto triangular en una excavación escolar. Luego de salir en el noticiero, Barbra Streisand aparece buscándolo, ya que es lo que necesita para poder convertirse en un monstruo gigante japonés.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Cartman siente curiosidad de saber quién es su padre, pero averiguarlo no es una tarea fácil debido a que su madre se acostó con muchos hombres.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: The Maury Show

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: These denying dads swear there's no way they're the father! These moms need to prove them wrong. The only thing that's missing is the truth! DNA results don't lie, but after the results are read, who will be left looking for more answers?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Shantice is worried sick that her husband is cheating on her with prostitutes. Could Heather's fiancé have impregnated another woman? Plus, Karlissa's world may shatter when she finds out if her man cheated on her with her best friend.

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Shocking stories of accused cheaters put to the test! Shantice thinks her husband is cheating on her with prostitutes. Did Heather's fiancé impregnate another woman? Karlissa's world may shatter when she hears if her man cheated with her best friend.

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Jahaza believes that her fiancé Rafiq is cheating on her with the babysitter! Nikema is married to a motivational speaker named Drew. Is he motivating other women into his bed? Plus, Kim and Aaron are back…but this time she's got a secret to reveal!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Last time Lissett was on the show, she proved to her man Orlando that she was not a cheater. This time Lissett's sister has something crazy to confess! Then, Dretta's convinced that James is plowing more than other women's driveways.

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Brenda and her man Aaron return after proving that Aaron was a cheater! Now they're here to prove that Aaron didn't father Tammie's baby. Then, Cat will test her boyfriend Tim and his brother Don to find out who her child's father is!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Kayla and Bruce took a home DNA test that said Bruce was not the father of her baby, but she refuses to believe that test, so they'll settle it today! Chaundra and Holly suspect Christian the father of their 4 kids! Did Rikki cheat on his wife twice?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Did Tu'Shaun cheat on Nette with her sisters? Sister Bobbie has a shocking confession that could threaten both Nette's relationship with her man and both of her sisters! Then, triplet Alisha fears that her husband is sleeping with her 2 sisters!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Last time they were on MAURY, Leslie proved that Daniel was her baby's father. Now they're back to deny that Daniel fathered his ex-girlfriend Dina's son. Then, Glenn denies that he's the feather of his ex's daughter and his own wife's son!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: The lie detector results are in and the truth is coming out! These guests say their loved ones are cheating behind their backs. But who cheated? How many times? And can they handle the results? All will be revealed on the today's explosive MAURY.

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Da'Shan is here with his new girl Tyrekia to prove that he's not the father of Ashley's baby! Ashley is 1000% positive that Da'Shan is the father and is here to prove it once and for all. But what will the DNA results reveal?

programme.title: Boxing

programme.title: Boxing

programme.desc: Two of boxing's biggest names finally met in the ring, as Floyd Mayweather Jr. challenged Oscar De La Hoya.

programme.desc: Two of the best fighters of their generation met as Bernard Hopkins defended his title against Joe Calzaghe.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Hundreds of beautiful and talented women converge on AT&T Stadium to start the hardest audition process in professional sports, trying out for a coveted spot on the most famous NFL cheerleading squad in the world, the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With the field narrowed down to 119 women, the pressure is on. They must quickly learn a power pom routine and the famous kickline in order to perform it an hour later before the judges.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The veterans finally enter the audition process. Now all 83 women are judged head to head during a panel interview, a solo dance performance and on their appearance on the football field as seen and the big screen.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: 44 women begin the very first training camp at the new 1 billion dollar Cowboys' facility, The Star. At the First Meeting, Kelli lays down the law and makes it clear that eight women will be sent home this summer.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: First, the ladies need to have the "classic look" of a Dallas Cowboys Cheerleader. Kelli's hair and make-up transformations are legendary. The ladies are also assessed through a new state of the art fitness test, "Styku".

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli media trains the rookie candidates to determine who best represents the DCC at press events. NBC news anchor, Meredith Land tests their on-camera interview skills.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Personality is critical when representing the DCC brand. Kelli takes the women on location to see how they interact during a public appearance.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Katy Perry's choreographer, Nick Florez, stops by to offer some performance advice to the ladies. A day that each cheerleader never forgets. The first time they wear the DCC uniform to pose for their cameo photos.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The squad goes on an appearance to support pop music star, Demi Lovato. The ladies learn the entrance to the famed pre-game dance. It's a make or break moment. If a woman can't learn it quickly it might be her last night.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With two suspended vets, the team must re-block their formations for their Hall Of Fame performance. New vets step up as a new point of the triangle is named. The rookie candidates try to get their footing during this never seen before rehearsal.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: 23 veterans travel to Canton, Ohio to perform at Jerry Jones' induction to the Pro Football Hall of Fame. All eyes are watching as the DCC perform for the NFL elite.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: As training camp winds down the pressure skyrockets. No one wants to be sent home now. The ladies start to crack under the pressure. Another one is sent home. Will this be the final cut?

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli announces the official squad and the women realize the hard-fought dream of becoming a Dallas Cowboys Cheerleader. Full of excitement and nerves, the squad prepares for their very first football game at AT&T Stadium.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Hundreds of eager hopefuls -- ranging from starry-eyed rookies to experienced NFL cheerleaders -- gather at AT&T Stadium for a shot at joining the world's most famous squad.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A teenager's life is turned upside down by a shocking discovery as what seems like a fatal accident reveals itself to be something much more disturbing.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: While responding to a house fire in New Jersey, firefighters discover the burned remains of the homeowner in the basement; new interviews and legal developments about the latest twists and turns in the case.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Recently uncovered pages from John Hinckley Jr.'s diary, which he began writing after he was arrested for trying to assassinate President Ronald Reagan; an interview with the officer who questioned Hinckley after the attempted assassination.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Years after a Montana man is found dead, his son opens up a box of case files to find out what really happened.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Mysterious deaths occur inside a traveling commune, starting an investigation that lasts more than a decade; two sisters -- former commune members -- reveal stories that involve lies, lust and greed.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: The remains of 11 female bodies are found in the desert outside of Albuquerque, N.M.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A microscopic clue and a stroke of luck help authorities solve the murder of a young woman that took place inside her Jacksonville Beach, Fla., home.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A successful businesswoman and mother of three is found shot in her office; the investigation into her death leaves a family divided.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When a woman's remains are found miles from her home, investigators start digging into her past.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Detectives look into a couple's complicated past when a man finds his wife stabbed to death in their home.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: The unbelievable murder of Carol Kennedy, a popular college professor, artist and mother.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Investigators search for a New Mexico mechanic who has been missing for eight years.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A tight-knit Long Island family go to extraordinary lengths to find their missing sister.

programme.title: Double Shot at Love with DJ Pauly D & Vinny
programme.desc: Pauly and Vinny face off in a Double Shot debate, the singles vote for superlatives in the house, and Nikki shows the guys a different side of herself.

programme.title: Double Shot at Love with DJ Pauly D & Vinny
programme.desc: Coming in hot with her aggressive, confrontational approach, Pauly and Vinny's Jersey Shore roommate Angelina drops in to sort out which ladies are there for the right reason.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Back to the Rocking Horse
programme.desc: Twenty more beautiful babes vie for his love and affection. Some bare more than their souls in an attempt to grab Bret's attention.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Peep Show
programme.desc: In the first ever Peep Show Contest, the girls all compete for a date with Bret by showing off their greatest “talents.”

programme.title: Rock of Love: Stroller Derby
programme.desc: But things turn ugly when the most hated girl in the house gets alone time with Bret – the fangs come out and the girls are out for blood!

programme.title: Rock of Love: A Ride on the Wild Side
programme.desc: Bret wants a girl with good manual skills so he tests their aptitude with nuts and bolts in a custom motorcycle build off.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Mud Bowl II
programme.desc: The “Divine Nine” compete in the second annual Bret Michaels Mud Bowl!

programme.title: Rock of Love: Once a Cowgirl
programme.desc: For the two women who have yet to win a date with Bret, Rodeo's Rocking Rodeo could be their last chance to make a connection.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Red, White and a Little Blue
programme.desc: The remaining seven girls display their ability to rock an audience as they perform at a USO show for military veterans.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Video Vixens
programme.desc: With only six girls left in the house, tensions run high as Bret tests the girls' creativity by making them shoot, direct and edit their own music videos.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Going to Ex-tremes
programme.desc: Bret shocks the girls by inviting their exes. He takes the guys out on the town to dig up dirt on the girls.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Bitter Suite
programme.desc: Bret surprises the final four with a trip to Las Vegas. One girl's lies cause Bret to question her intentions toward him.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Rockin’ the ‘Rents
programme.desc: Bret wants to know more about the three remaining girls, and what better way to get the 411 than moving their parents into the house!

programme.title: Rock of Love: Bret’s Rock of Love
programme.desc: Bret takes his final two girls south of the border to spend some quality, romantic time with each one before making his final choice.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: A day trader for the New York Stock Exchange, Lisa Glicksman knows exactly how to give The Banker a run for her money.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: With 26 sealed briefcases full of varying amounts of cash, ranging from a penny to $1m – contestants decide whether to accept an offer of cash from ‘the Banker,’ in exchange for what might be contained in the contestant’s chosen briefcase.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Riley’s having a great semester. He’s even taking lifeguard training to prepare for a summer job.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: News travels fast about Riley and Sam’s big fight. Riley doesn’t think much of it – until rumours start spreading that Sam was gay-bashed.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s Matchmaker week at Degrassi and Declan’s not interested in a serious relationship. The Diplomat brat is here for a good time, not a long time.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Against all odds, Holly J has fallen for Declan. Suddenly she gets what everyone’s been so excited about for so long.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: KC’s living the high school dream. The basketball team made it to the provincial finals, the Sports Awards Gala is coming up, and he finally has a mentor who gets him – Coach Carson.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: KC’s life is on the fast track. With the final basketball game approaching, the pressure is at an all-time high and Coach Carson has really taken KC under his wing.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma and Kelly make a pit stop at Degrassi while on their Cross Country Bike Adventure raising awareness for their Re-Cycle project. Combining the great outdoors with her sexy boyfriend, Emma’s convinced she’s destined for the best summer ever.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s been a tough year for Peter. Mia’s departure, a brief meth problem, and the serious downgrade from lead singer to roadie.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Sav and Anya have been planning for their Spring Formal for as long as they can remember. It’s going to be magical.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Anya is more determined than ever to convince Sav they should be together – even if he is bringing family-friend and arranged-marriage-bride Farrah to the Spring Formal.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Post-KC, Clare’s social life consists of building props for Declan’s musical and reading every book in the “Fortnight” vampire series. But when Clare has a sexy vampire dream about Declan, she’s shocked by her inner fantasy life.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Riley’s completed anger management and has been named ‘Degrassi’s most eligible bachelor’. He’s been keeping his true feelings about guys under wraps – but he’s not sure he wants to anymore.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Holly J and Declan are closer than ever. They’ve made it through the year, Holly J’s applied for internships all over the city, and with exams almost done, all they need to worry about is Declan’s musical.

programme.desc: Animatronics, computer animation and science re-create the dinosaurs' world.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Special effects-filled documentary beginning 49 million years ago. The world is heavily forested and birds rule the planet, preying on small mammals. Whales have not yet evolved, and their ancestors walk on the land.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: A pregnant basilosaurus, an 18-metre, carnivorous whale which lives in the Tethys Sea, is forced to kill the young of a smaller whale to ensure the survival of her unborn calf.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Going back 25 million years to the time of the indricothere, which was the largest mammal ever to live on dry land, being seven metres high and weighing 15 tons! The only threat to an adult would have been the Hyaenodon which was the size of a rhino.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: The beginnings of mankind can be traced back 3.2 million years to Ethiopia and the advent of Australopithecus, a type of ape which, like humans, was bipedal. These early members of the human family faced many dangers, including the sabre-toothed cat.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Revealing the exotic, oversized creatures that inhabited South America one million years ago, such as the deadly smilodon, the largest of all sabre tooth cats.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Looking at the depths of the Ice Age, following a group of mammoths who have been forced to travel south with the advent of winter. On a dangerous journey across the Alps, many become trapped in bogs or fall victim to predators.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The evolution of the predators who lived 550 million years ago, and how the first amphibians migrated from sea to land.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Three hundred million years ago, the forests were ruled by insects. This was a world in which giant dragonflies battled with two-foot-wide spiders.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: On the supercontinent Pangaea, early therapsids, creatures more similar to mammals than reptiles, fight for survival alongside other animals. In the carboniferous swamps, insects and arthropods take over and grow into giants.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The life of the first reptilian carnivores on Earth, told through computer animation.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The Jurassic period saw the advent of the largest and strongest dinosaurs that ever roamed the Earth.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: A look at the world as it was 149 million years ago - in the late Jurassic Period. The old continents have broken up and much of the land is under water. Huge shallow seas have supported a revolution in marine life.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: With wings longer than those of a small plane, pterosaurs were the largest creatures ever known to have flown.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: This programme looks at the Cretaceous period, 106 million years ago. Volcanic activity forces the continents apart, and dinosaurs diversify into a range of species to cope with environmental extremes.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: It is the late Cretaceous period and Tyrannosaurus rex is the top predator, but the Earth is poisoned by volcanic activity and a comet strikes.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: In a time when monstrous creatures ruled the earth, South America was the land of the giants. Nigel Marven walks among these gigantic creatures, on a quest to witness the largest predator bringing down the largest prey.

programme.title: Science of Walking With Beasts
programme.desc: This episode explains how the 120-million-year reign of the dinosaurs ended when mammals became the fastest and fiercest creatures on the planet.

programme.title: Science of Walking With Beasts
programme.desc: A look at the science that has proved Darwin's idea that intelligent, sophisticated humans have an ancestral connection with the ape.

programme.title: Magnify Presents: Tua
programme.desc: Tua Tagovailoa, a generational football talent, embarks on a journey that began from a childhood family prophecy; Tua attempts to overcome a career-threatening injury and rise as one of the most uniquely skilled players in the history of the game.

programme.title: Weather Command
programme.desc: Going inside the Weather Command Center for America's forecast authority for all the latest breaking weather news; tracking every storm as fox weather meteorologists, contributors and correspondents deliver real-time weather alerts and forecasting.

programme.title: America's Weather Center

programme.title: FOX Weather Live
programme.desc: Steve Bender hosts from Studio W, the heart of fox weather, as extreme weather strikes; Steve provides real-time alerts and information to keep you and your family safe and get you ready for the next day ahead.

programme.title: Fox Weather @ Night
programme.desc: Pull an all-nighter with fox weather as our meteorologists recap the day in weather news and forecast across America for tomorrow.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young woman was found dead on a golf course in the Bahamas. The grass on that course was so distinctive, it had evidentiary value. The evidence led police to two suspects, each of whom blamed the other.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the search for the killer of two Texas teenagers, a behavioral profile led to suspect Jason Massey. Hard science proved the profile was correct, and Massey was executed by lethal injection on April 3, 2001.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a successful stockbroker doesn't return home after a late shift, his wife reports him missing.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A young girl named Tess is excited to go to Schiphol Airport in her hometown of Amsterdam, where she will be going on her first airplane ride; Jett brings her a carry-on suitcase, but trouble arises when it goes missing.

programme.title: Super Wings

programme.desc: A tea party planned by the children turns into a fun opportunity to reinforce lessons about good manners! Throughout the day, Baby Bop is given helpful advice.

programme.title: Barney & Friends

programme.title: Barney & Friends

programme.title: Miss Spider's Sunny Patch Friends

programme.title: Miss Spider's Sunny Patch Friends
programme.desc: When a cockroach from the city blows into Sunny Patch, Squirt is embarrassed. Then, when the kids find a shiny bottle cap in the meadow, they mistake it for a star and blame Squirt for wishing it out of the sky.

programme.title: Miss Spider's Sunny Patch Friends
programme.desc: Shelley the snail teaches Miss Spider's faster-moving bug brood that sometimes you have to slow down to notice special things. Then, Bounce and Shimmer get their hands on some "magic" beans.

programme.title: Miss Spider's Sunny Patch Friends

programme.title: Larry King Now: Ludacris

programme.title: Larry King Now: Seal

programme.title: Lil Wayne: Bling
programme.desc: Releasing his first solo studio album at just the age of 15, Lil Wayne has shot through the ranks of the hip-hop scene. He has challenged societal ideas about image and has really become the representative of modern hip-hop. Follow the story of the man...

programme.title: Hendrix (2000)
programme.desc: On stage, Jimi Hendrix (Wood Harris) electrified audiences with his powerful guitar playing and mesmerizing performances. But behind the scenes -- fueled by a dark haze of drugs and alcohol -- this rising star was on a crash course with destiny.

programme.title: Wu-Tang Clan: Of Mics & Men
programme.desc: The RZA, The GZA, 'Ol Dirty Bastard, Inspectah Deck, Raekwon The Chef, U-God, Ghostface Killah, Cappadonna, Masta Killa and Method Man cut a song - "Protect Ya Neck" - and the world hasn't been the same since.

programme.title: Wu-Tang Clan: Of Mics & Men
programme.desc: Wu-Tang Clan's underground rap single starts to blow up and business moved fast. Despite their success, things were still going on back home in the projects that affected their friends and family — the Wu weren't immune to it. Nor were they bulletproof.

programme.title: Wu-Tang Clan: Of Mics & Men
programme.desc: The sweet smell of success was intoxicating but the death of a friend changed the way each member saw the world and the Wu. The members would all go on to have successful solo careers, and Wu-Tang's global footprint was massive.

programme.title: Wu-Tang Clan: Of Mics & Men
programme.desc: Twenty-five years in, a family looks to cement a legacy. 'Ol Dirty is dead. Everybody has gone solo. The 'W' is fading. Yet Wu-Tang Clan, their logo, their music and their message remain indelible fixtures in the history of music and America.

programme.title: Hotspots
programme.desc: The many habitats of one of Australia's most diverse areas plays home to an array of bird species.

programme.title: The Magic Circle of the Reef
programme.desc: Pelagic beings live in the so-called reef water column, the zone between the seabed and the surface; they are species that travel the sea placidly, feeding when they are hungry and swimming slowly throughout their lives.

programme.title: Alien Abyss
programme.desc: Feeling the love in the strange-but-heartwarming partnerships between some of Earth's oddest creatures; diving deep to see strange animals, from snapping shrimp to wolf eels, offer a hand to their fellow ocean-going weirdos to ensure mutual survival.

programme.title: Deep Dive Australia
programme.desc: Exploring the shores of the Northern Territory and the abundant waters of the Great Barrier Reef; Lizzie faces flooded roads, hungry saltwater crocs, and killer jellyfish as she investigates why many deadly creatures make remote areas their home.

programme.title: Deep Dive Australia
programme.desc: Saying goodbye to the tropics and dipping into the cool southern-coast waters; witnessing grey nurse sharks, shape-shifting cuttlefish and blue whales; playing with penguins and sea lions.

programme.title: Alien Abyss
programme.desc: Exploring the bizarre mating rituals of the ocean's most peculiar creatures; learning how bloody battles for mates, gender bending, and super-size litters of babies might secure a next generation for these animals.

programme.title: The Magic Circle of the Reef

programme.title: Wild Caribbean: Rhythms of Life

programme.title: Matlock (1986)

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Ben defends a flashy rock star against charges of murder.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: A twisted tale of blackmail and jury tampering tempts Matlock to defend a young law associate unjustly accused of murder.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp hatches a plan for a moonlit raid on the Marine vault, but Commander Jonathan is has a nasty surprise waiting for the pirates! Meanwhile, Sanji and Nami attempt to recover the waver.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The extreme arrogance of a Marine special investigator clears a path for Luffy and company to make their escape! Unfortunately, the Straw Hats still have to find their gold before returning to the high seas!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats may think they’re in the clear, but Commander Jonathan has one final trap waiting to ground the Going Merry! If Luffy’s crew is to escape, they’ll need a helping hand – or eight!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his mates survive and near-death encounter with some mischievous sea monkeys only to land on a mysterious island where everything is much longer than it should be!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After a loyal horse and his recently-returned master are assaulted by thugs, Luffy is drawn into a Davy Back Fight with the Foxy Pirates. The Straw Hat captain never backs down from a challenge, but this contest could cost him his crew!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Davy Back Fight begins with a treacherous Donut Race around Ling Ring Long Land! The Straw Hats square off against the Foxy Pirates in a battle to see who loses a crew member!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami uses her considerable skill as a navigator to put the Straw Hats on the verge of victory, but the captain of the Foxy Pirates has more than a few dirty tricks up his sleeve!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Thanks to some foxy sabotage, Chopper has been lost to the enemy. The only hope for getting him back lies with Zoro and Sanji, but can they learn to work together in time to save the little reindeer?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji and Zoro take a beating at the hands of the Groggy Monsters, but they won’t give up the fight. With a little luck – and some teamwork – they’ll emerge victorious from round two of the Davy Back Fight!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Round three of the Davy Back Fight is a rip roaring roller derby! Chopper’s fate still hangs in the balance, and the Straw Hats have a huge problem: Luffy doesn’t know how to skate!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the Davy Back Fight sprints toward a sensational finish, the Straw Hats find themselves on the brink of defeat! Luffy’s finally managed to stay on his skates, but the Foxy Pirates are notorious cheaters!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats somehow manage to defeat the Foxy Pirates and win back Chopper, but Luffy eagerly accepts the challenge of a rematch! What is the captain thinking? And will his crew mutiny?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A devious game of dodge ball costs the Straw Hats their archaeologist. Now, they’ll have to win an unusual uphill race to reclaim Robin and avoid losing another crew member!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Robin and Chopper have both been lost to the Foxy Pirates, and there’s only one match remaining in the Davy Back Fight! Luffy’s got a plan to get his mates back, but failure would mean the end of the Straw Hats forever!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Captain Foxy go toe-to-toe in a brutal battle waged aboard a booby-trapped boat. Luffy is fighting for his crew, but Captain Foxy’s dirty tricks have him on the ropes!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy’s epic battle with Captain Foxy reaches its riveting end, and a very old man with a very tall horse reunites with a face from very long ago.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: When Luffy and his mates lose their memory, Robin is the only Straw Hat who can remember their adventures together. Can she recover their recollections before the crew splits up?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Robin tries to hold the crew together while unraveling the mystery of the missing memories. Meanwhile, Nami and Zoro flashback to painful moments from their pasts.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats finally discover the culprit behind their memory loss, but they’ve got bigger problems. The mysterious thief is determined to pit Zoro and Luffy against each other!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro and Luffy fight to the death, Nami attempts to orchestrate an uprising, and Sanji discovers he’s willing to kick a kid in order to get his memories back!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats finally regain their memories, but a much larger challenge looms on the horizon. The mysterious thief is about to transform into something even more powerful!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A terrible storm leads to another run in with the devious Captain Foxy! When Luffy makes the dangerous decision to help his old foe, it could spell disaster for the Straw Hats!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his mates must survive another outrageous battle aboard Captain Foxy’s booby-trapped boat, and even if they survive, something far worse awaits them!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats take time out to help a group of hungry castaways, but trouble looms on the horizon. An icy marine adversary is out to track down Robin!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Chopper and Usopp work feverishly to save Robin from her icy tomb, and Luffy looks to settle the score with Admiral Aokiji in a man-to-man fight to the finish!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: An encounter with a giant swimming frog leads to a close call with a seafaring train! Next up for the Straw Hats: drop anchor at a town full of water and seek out a shipwright!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy, Usopp, and Nami take a wild ride through Water Seven in search of a shipwright. Meanwhile, Chopper and Robin get separated during their quest to find a bookstore!

programme.desc: A general store owner in Rusk, Texas, calls 911 and makes a harrowing confession, but as detectives dig deeper, they discover a disturbing pattern making them rethink the motivation behind the crime.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Ash y sus amigos caminan por un sendero y caen en un hoyo cavado por un grupo de traviesos Squirtle. ¿Por qué el Escuadrón Squirtle es una amenaza para la gente del lugar?

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: El grupo conoce a Bill, un investigador Pokémon que está esperando en su faro la llegada de un Pokémon único en su tipo, nunca antes visto por los humanos. ¿Acaso existirá un Pokémon así?

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Ansioso por ganar una medalla, Ash reta al Lt. Surge. Pikachu entra sin ganas a la batalla, donde descubre que su oponente es un Raichu, un feroz Pokémon con un tremendo poder eléctrico, ¡y la forma evolucionada de Pikachu!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Ash y sus amigos abordan el crucero St. Anne gracias a los boletos proporcionados por Jessie y James disfrazados. Su más reciente plan es atraer entrenadores Pokémon hacia el barco para robar sus Pokémon.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Una tormenta obliga a todos, excepto al Equipo Rocket y a nuestros héroes, a abandonar el zozobrante St. Anne. Ash, Brock y Misty deben hacer equipo con sus antiguos enemigos para sobrevivir esta bochornosa situación.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Mientras nuestros héroes y el Equipo Rocket sobreviven contra toda posibilidad al hundimiento del St. Anne, se ven arrastrados a otra peligrosa situación cuando son atacados por el Pokémon Gyarados.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Cuando unos Tentacool interfieren con la construcción de un hotel, una mujer ofrece una recompensa a quien pueda repelerlos. Sin embargo, nuestros héroes deben entrar en acción cuando la treta del Equipo Rocket falla.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Nuestros héroes llegan a un pequeño pueblo porteño donde se celebra un festival de verano. Para recuperarse de su duro viaje, Ash y sus amigos deciden relajarse y disfrutar las festividades.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Cuando los chicos ven a un grupo de Butterfree volando sobre el océano, Ash decide liberar a su propio Butterfree. Luego de ser rechazado una vez, ¿podrá el Butterfree de Ash ganar el corazón de su rosado amor?

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Los chicos finalmente llegan a Ciudad Azafrán, donde una jovencita está al mando de un gimnasio Pokémon con sus poderes psíquicos. ¡Si Ash derrota a la líder de gimnasio Sabrina, ganará su cuarta medalla de gimnasio!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Tras su derrota ante Sabrina, Ash debe atrapar a un Pokémon tipo Fantasma para acabar con el tipo Psíquico de la líder del Gimnasio Azafrán. Se dirige hacia la Torre Pokémon en Pueblo Lavanda, donde se dice que habitan.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Luego de dejar la Torre Pokémon acompañados de Haunter, Ash regresa a Ciudad Azafrán con una sola meta en mente: ¡ganar una Medalla de Gimnasio de la poderosa Líder de Gimnasio tipo Psíquico, Sabrina!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Cuando Ash intenta atrapar a un Mankey salvaje, este pierde el control y usa Golpe contra todo el grupo; ¡incluso roba la gorra de Ash! ¿Encontrará Ash la forma de apaciguar a este belicoso Pokémon?

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Tras insultar el perfume de la Líder de Gimnasio Erika en una tienda departamental, Ash debe ir a extremos increíbles para poder poner un pie en el Gimnasio Celadon, ¡sin mencionar el considerarlo digno de retarla!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: La Oficial Jenny revela que una ola de sueño afecta al área desde hace varios días. Nuestros héroes sospechan que tiene que ver con la desaparición de varios niños y el porqué los Pokémon no mejoran en el Centro Pokémon.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Ante la insistente petición de Brock, nuestros héroes hacen una parada en un lugar bien conocido por los criadores Pokémon por sus salones de belleza Pokémon.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: A las afueras de Ciudad Fucsia, nuestros héroes se encuentran con Hitmonchan, un Pokémon tipo Pelea. Sin pensarlo, Ash lo enfrenta, pero Pikachu y él son derrotados. ¿Quién es el misterioso entrenador de este Hitmonchan?

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Cuando un apagón sumerge a Ciudad Grisácea en la oscuridad, Ash y sus amigos van a investigar a la planta de energía cercana, donde encuentran a Magnemite y un huésped de Grimer. ¿Serán responsables del apagón en la ciudad?

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Ash, Brock, Misty y Pikachu se encuentran muy perdidos en las montañas. Mientras se apresuran por un camino irregular que no aparece en su mapa, ¡de repente oyen una gran explosión!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: ¡En su camino hacia el siguiente reto de Batalla de Gimnasio parece que se han perdido. ¡Ash y sus amigos llegan a una enorme mansión que parece ser la guarida oculta de un ninja! ¿Acaso será el Gimnasio Fucsia?

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Luego de tomar el lugar de la herida Lara, ¿podrá Ash controlar a su feroz Ponyta y guiarlo para ganar la carrera anual?

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Nuestros héroes acompañan a la Oficial Jenny al interior del bosque en persecución de unos cazadores. Pronto descubren a un niño en medio de una manada de Kangaskhan. Su nombre es Tommy y nadie sabe el secreto de su infancia.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Luego de encontrar un muy largo puente que sólo puede cruzarse en bicicleta, un trabajo repartiendo medicina es el boleto perfecto para que Ash y sus amigos lleguen a Pueblo Soleado.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Atrapados en un repentino chubasco, nuestros héroes rápidamente buscan refugio. Tras arrastrar a una renuente Misty, Ash y Brock entran a una cabaña, ¡y de inmediato tienen la impresión de que no están solos!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Los chicos descubren a un grupo de Pikachu salvajes, y aunque al principio parecen asustados por el intruso, el grupo eventualmente confía en el Pikachu de Ash. ¿Qué sentirá Pikachu al ver a otros como él en la naturaleza?

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Ash y sus amigos encuentran una enorme casa con una fiesta de jardín en marcha a la que asisten los Entrenadores de los Pokémon que evolucionan usando Rocas Evolutivas. ¿Estará aquí el Entrenador del Eevee abandonado?

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Nuestros hambrientos héroes llegan a una pequeña aldea. A cambio de una comida, Ash, Misty y Brock aceptan investigar qué está causando que se seque el río, lo cual destruye la cosecha de la aldea.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Acompañamos a nuestros héroes a las afueras de Ciudad Oscura, la cual parece estar desierta. No hay nadie en las calles, incluso a mediodía. ¿Qué volvió a este un lugar tan desolado?

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Ash entrena rigurosamente incluso en las vacaciones de primavera, ¡hasta que nuestros héroes descubren que hay un carnaval rodante cercano! ¡Ash, Misty y Brock pronto se unen a la diversión de la feria!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!

programme.desc: Dax falls in love with a man who will soon disappear with his planet into another dimension for sixty years.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Wil Riker's renegade duplicate steals the Defiant and attacks Cardassian territory, forcing Sisko to assist Gul Dukat in stopping him.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: A Bajoran celebration on the station serves as the backdrop for an epidemic of inexplicable romantic attractions among the crew.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: A transporter accident sends Sisko, Bashir, and Dax three centuries back in time to a crucial point in Earth's history.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Trapped in Earth's past, Sisko must assume a pivotal role in history to try and restore the future.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Bashir must use questionable methods in order to keep Vedek Bareil alive long enough to help bring about a Bajoran peace treaty with Cardassia.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: On a rescue mission to an alien shipwrecked training mission, they discover one of its trainees to be a human.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Dr. Crusher's fear of losing loved ones becomes real when her worries create an alternate reality.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The crew of the Enterprise enters into orbit around the home planet of their former crew-mate, Tasha Yar, where they encounter her sister.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When the head of the Klingon high council passes on, Picard finds himself in the middle of the struggle for the now-vacant position. Meanwhile, Worf re-unites with a past love, only to find he now has a son.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Riker has to quit his birthday party during a so-far uneventful patrol voyage at the Neutral Zone to head an away team when a Romulan secret base is found on a planet which was believed uninhabited.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Before leaving for Starfleet Academy, Wesley Crusher accompanies Captain Picard on a dangerous mission.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: As an unknown force drags the Enterprise, Deanna Troi struggles with the loss of her powers.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Data tries to comprehend the complex emotions between O'Brien and Keiko, who are about to be married.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After being fired upon by a Cardassian vessel, Picard races against time to find out the facts behind the Cardassian commander's claim that the Federation attacked one of their outposts.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: While answering a distress call, Picard finds himself not sure of exactly who he is dealing with, but he's sure he's NOT dealing with the planet's version of The Devil, as she claims to be.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Effects of passing through a wormhole give the Enterprise crew a sense that they were unconscious for more than the thirty seconds they've been led to believe.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Commander William Riker has been on an acculturation mission under an alias for months on the Arkonian planet.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: While the Enterprise is in a star-base, Lt. Commander Geordi La Forge gets a very special visitor, brilliant engineering designer Dr. Leah Brahms, who he feels to know almost intimately as a 'hologram version' of herself with 'whom' he bonded.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Enterprise has finally tracked the missing starship USS Britain. Counselor Deanna Troi senses trouble with the life on board and joins Riker's boarding party.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Faced with a more dangerous enemy than the Borg, Captain Janeway prepares to make a deal with the Devil.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Voyager finds a solution to combat the invader of Borg space.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The crew must say goodbye to one member of their family just as they are adjusting to a new one.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: A close encounter with death teaches Torres the true meaning of honor.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Stranded on a strange planet, Chakotay finds himself in the middle of a deceptive war.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: A rescue mission puts Torres and the Doctor in the hands of a psychopathic hologram.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Haunting visions lead Seven of Nine on a quest to rejoin the Collective.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The Voyager crew is invaded by an alien race conducting dangerous experiments.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: A disruption in the space-time continuum forces the crew to evacuate Voyager.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: A badly damaged Voyager with a skeleton crew leads an armada of interplanetary ships against them.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: A telepathic race arrests Torres for thinking violent thoughts.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: While searching for equipment stolen from Voyager, Janeway gets help from her holodeck mentor, Leonardo da Vinci.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: When Neelix dies and is brought back to life, he begins to doubt his spiritual beliefs.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Nightmares become reality when the crew is attacked in their dreams.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Jackson and McKay have reactivated the Attero device, an ancient machine designed to annihilate the Wraith. In doing so, they discover the reason the device was ultimately abandoned… Meanwhile, Todd continues to hold the Daedalus crew captive.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Trapped beneath ruins in an underground maze, some of the Destiny's crew are stranded when the ship jumps back into FTL. The situation grows even more desperate when Rush (Robert Carlyle) learns that Destiny will soon be leaving the galaxy!

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: With crew members stranded, Destiny continues to cross from the present galaxy into the next one. Unable to alter the Destiny's course, Dr. Rush calculates the Destiny will fall short of making it to the next galaxy, stranding them indefinitely.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Members of the crew begin experiencing disturbingly realistic hallucinations. With the hallucinations spreading to other members of the crew, Dr. Johansen (Alaina Huffman) must track down whatever is causing the episodes before someone dies.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: After Dr. Rush has a disturbing dream, he suspects that Telford may be a spy for the Lucian Alliance. Rush confides in Col. Young who suspects there may have been residual memory overlap during the doctor’s switch with Colonel Telford days before.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 discovers that Nirrti is mutating the inhabitants of an unexplored planet with a machine that rearranges their DNA. Captured in an attempt to stop her, O'Neill must find a way to escape before he and SG-1 are subjected to the same fate.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: General Hammond and the Pentagon are forced to reveal the existence of the Stargate to other world governments. Senator Kinsey suggests that General Hammond be relieved of his command and that the civilian-run NID oversee the Stargate program.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 discovers three human survivors on an off-world planet who claim to be under attack by hostile aliens. While Carter helps repair the ship's computer, she learns that the survivors are hiding a secret…and things may not be all they seem.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Teal'c mysteriously begins to hallucinate and is haunted by visions of an existence where he is a human being. As his paranoia deepens, Teal'c must rely on the help of friend Daniel Jackson to determine where his dreams end...and his reality begins.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 accompanies the X-53 on its voyage into deep space. When the ship drops out of hyperspace, SG-1 is stranded with no means of getting back to Earth. Their only option lies in exploring a nearby planet where a Stargate is thought to be located.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 encounters a civilization desperate to be freed from the clutches of a Goa'uld. While on the planet, Jonas falls ill. His illness is diagnosed as a brain tumor but it gives him the ability to see the future...where SG-1 are walking into a trap!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Daniel appears to O'Neill and alerts him that Anubis has located the Eye of Ra, an object of power hidden on Abydos. With Daniel's help, SG-1 find the Eye first. Determined to have it, Anubis threatens to destroy the planet unless they hand it over.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: As SG-1 begins its search for the Lost City, they discover that Jackson has been returned by the Ancients without any memory of who he was. While SG-1 tries to help him regain his memory, they discover that the Lost City is not on the same planet.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Anubis travels to Kelowna after discovering that it has mines of a more powerful source of energy that he can use to make his new weapon more destructive. The leaders of Kelowna contact SG-1 for their help, but make an ill-advised deal with Anubis.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: Unforeseen adversaries and new complications threaten to derail all that the Cardiff Electric team has worked for at COMDEX.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: As Gordon and Joe prepare to ship the Giant, a suspicious defect calls their partnership into question. Cameron takes her future into her own hands.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: As Bosworth tries to reconnect with his former life, the Clarks receive a surprising invitation. A problem from within Mutiny threatens its survival.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire

programme.desc: Gordon returns to California to reconnect with his brother, Henry, as Joe uses his newfound leverage to change Wheeler's thinking about computing.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: Left reeling by the launch of a rival, Mutiny takes measures to ensure its survival. Attempting to quell his paranoia, Gordon pays a price.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: When Blueberry gives a First Frost Day 'secret' gift that's more what she wants than what her giftee wants, a hot-potato of passing on the unwanted gift occurs.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: The beginning of winter brings a brief spell of springlike weather, ruining everyone's hopes for winter fun. With help from Strawberry, the community adapts to the changing conditions.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Apple isn't paying attention when Strawberry describes their campout tradition of telling 'Tall Tales.'

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Lemon and Raspberry's fashion podcast is saved by Apple, then almost sabotaged by Sweet and Sour when Lemon's 'mood hair' runs amok.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Blueberry spends all her time emulating her literary detective hero and ignores her friends, until Strawberry gives her a 'missing person case' to solve—the missing person being Blueberry herself!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Just as the girls are about to enjoy a vacation at their homemade resort, TV host Mavis Maraschino shows up to do a segment on Cherry Jam and disrupts their plans.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Angel Cake likes everything 'just so' — and when things don’t go her way, she’s a pretty bad sport.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake travels to magical Holidayland with Honey Pie Pony, searching for the perfect presents to give her friends.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: When the town needs a larger venue for their upcoming Glimmerberry Ball, Plum finds an ideal hollow tree for the occasion.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: When Strawberryland’s one movie theatre goes out of business, Strawberry has an idea to save it: she and her friends can film a movie to show there and attract crowds back to the theatre.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Plum’s plan to direct a small, simple fairy tale play as a surprise performance for the Baby Berrykins snowballs out of control when she hears of the same play being done on a grand scale in a big city theater.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Sour teasing Apple escalates into a 'prank war' between the two of them.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Apple's rave review on her berryweb page of Strawberry's new dessert starts a booming mail order dessert business for Berry Bitty City.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Berry Bitty City holds an election to see who will fill in as 'BerryFest Princess' while Princess Berrykin is absent.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Berry Bitty City holds its first talent show. When the girls discover a talent scout will attend, Lemon decides she has to perform without any help from her friends, even though they are all helping each other.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry's world-traveling cousin Apple Dumplin' stops at Berry Bitty City. What starts as a brief visit becomes a series of comical misadventures.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: When the town’s very formal Berry Bitty Buggy Derby is revived, the girls are unfamiliar with the traditional behavior for the event.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Honey Pie Pony is excited that the ponies of Ice Cream Island have invited her to take part in their annual Festival of the Horses.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures

programme.desc: Rosario visita el rancho Elizondo con el pretexto de saludar a Gabriela y a Martín, pero Armando le prohíbe que regrese allí. Fernando siente que la situación se le va de las manos.

programme.desc: El doctor Bustillo visita a su primo, le confiesa que descubrió que el paciente es su suegro y le pide el doble de dinero, pero lo que gana es una golpiza por parte de los hombres de Fernando.

programme.title: Pasion de Gavilanes (LAS)

programme.title: Los herederos del monte

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Juan se juega su destino provocando los celos de Paula, mientras Julieta siente que empeora su malestar y asiste al médico al sospechar que algo anda mal. Gaspar empieza a tener una crisis matrimonial por querer controlar a Guadalupe.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Julieta deja salir sus instintos violentos y atropella a Pedro por rabia, llega a la casa perturbada, pero se mentaliza que no hizo nada. Luego acusa a Paula de atacarla al sostener una conversación subida de tono. Emilio continúa con el plan.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Gaspar pierde el control a causa de sus celos y termina peleando con sus propios hermanos. Lupe lo abandona por su actitud. Juan y Paula sufren por la separación. Modesto podría ser descubierto al llevar a cabo las órdenes de Emilio.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Antonia despide a Valentina y a Max, ya no le importan pues todos los documentos han sido firmados. Ellos sufren un accidente. Francisca despierta abruptamente con la sensación de que su hijo ha muerto. Ricardo teme estar volviéndose adicto a Inés.

programme.title: La patrona

programme.title: La patrona

programme.title: La patrona
